title: 2025年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That watch is pretty.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, but it's expensive.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You're right.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「高い」「そうね」→1の「別の店に行こう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「別の店に行こう」→正解。2「箱に入ってる」→無関係。3「モールで」→文として不完全。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You look happy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I am. I got a new job at the library.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's great.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「図書館で新しい仕事を得た」「すごい」→1の「ワクワクしてる」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ワクワクしてる」→正解。2「もちろん」→不自然。3「その本持ってる」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I love this cake.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want some more?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Just a little.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「もう少しほしい」→3の「はいどうぞ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「数分間」→無関係。2「料理が上手じゃない」→無関係。3「はいどうぞ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where did you go on vacation?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went to Spain.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you eat seafood?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「シーフード食べた？」→1の「はい、おいしかった」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「はい、おいしかった」→正解。2「スペイン語を勉強中」→無関係。3「会議がある」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where did you go last weekend?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went snowboarding at Mt. Baker.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How was it?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どうだった？」→3の「ワクワクした」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「車で行った」→感想ではない。2「5つあった」→無関係。3「ワクワクした」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'd like an apple pie for dessert.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll make some.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. How many apples do you need?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「リンゴ何個いる？」→2の「4、5個買おう」が適切。
highlights: How many apples do you need
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「おいしかった」→過去形で不適切。2「4、5個買おう」→正解。3「お腹いっぱい」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is your math test today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, it is.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good luck!

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「頑張って！」→1の「全力を尽くす」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「全力を尽くす」→正解。2「難しかった」→まだ受けてない。3「気に入るよ」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where did you take this photo?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: In Toronto.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Who are the people with you?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「一緒にいる人は誰？」→3の「叔父と叔母」が適切。
highlights: Who are the people with you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「休暇中に」→人を聞いている。2「寒くて雨だった」→人を聞いている。3「叔父と叔母」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Were you at Sam's birthday party?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How was it?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どうだった？」→1の「楽しかった」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「楽しかった」→正解。2「いい考え」→無関係。3「チケットがない」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you have any plans for summer vacation?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. I'll go to Hawaii.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What will you do there?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何をする？」→3の「いとこを訪ねる」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ビーチで」→何をするかの答えでない。2「暑い」→活動でない。3「いとこを訪ねる」→正解。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, can we have curry for lunch?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We had curry yesterday. Let's have pizza.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I don't like pizza. How about spaghetti?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK.

questions.question: What will they eat for lunch today?
questions.explanation: 「スパゲティは？」「OK」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スープ」→言及なし。2「ピザ」→女の子が嫌い。3「スパゲティ」→正解。4「カレー」→昨日食べた。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What's that, Brenda?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: A letter from my grandfather.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where does he live?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: In Miami. I'll visit him this summer with my sister.

questions.question: Who lives in Miami?
questions.explanation: 「おじいちゃんからの手紙」「マイアミに住んでいる」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ブレンダ」→訪ねに行く。2「ブレンダの祖父」→正解。3「ブレンダの姉妹」→一緒に訪ねる。4「男の子」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where did you have dinner last night?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: At the new Italian restaurant.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Was it good?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, the food was delicious.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.explanation: 「新しいイタリアンレストラン」について話している。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「イタリア語の授業」→レストラン。2「イタリア旅行」→レストラン。3「好きな食べ物」→レストランの話。4「新しいレストラン」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: This is a great party. These cookies are delicious.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. Simon brought those.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you bring something, Tom?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, the cherry pie.

questions.question: Who brought the cookies to the party?
questions.explanation: 「サイモンがそれ（クッキー）を持ってきた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「女の子」→言及なし。2「女の子の母」→言及なし。3「トム」→チェリーパイ。4「サイモン」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Why weren't you at school yesterday?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went to the doctor because I had a cold.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you feel better today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes.

questions.question: Where did the boy go yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「風邪で医者に行った」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校」→行かなかった。2「医者」→正解。3「女の子の家」→言及なし。4「スーパー」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is your English speech contest next week?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, it's this weekend. But I don't have enough time to prepare.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I have exams tomorrow, so I have to study.

questions.question: When is the girl's English speech contest?
questions.explanation: 「今週末」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日」→今週末。2「明日」→試験がある日。3「今週末」→正解。4「来週」→否定された。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What time is it now?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's 8:55. The train left 10 minutes ago.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let's take the next one.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. It comes at 9:00.

questions.question: What time does the next train come?
questions.explanation: 「9時に来る」。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, can I go to the library now?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you need a book?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I can see my favorite movie there for free.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I see.

questions.question: Why does the boy want to go to the library?
questions.explanation: 「無料で好きな映画が見られる」。
highlights: I can see my favorite movie there for free
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「本を読む」→否定された。2「チケットを買う」→無料。3「映画を見る」→正解。4「俳優に会う」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went camping during the summer vacation.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Cool. Did you go swimming in the lake?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. But we watched beautiful stars at night.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's great.

questions.question: What did the girl do when she went camping?
questions.explanation: 「夜に美しい星を見た」。
highlights: we watched beautiful stars at night
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「山登り」→言及なし。2「湖で泳いだ」→否定された。3「サイクリング」→言及なし。4「星を見た」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you have a cold, Jack?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, Ms. Tanaka, but I'm tired.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Go home and rest.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thank you. I'll feel better soon.

questions.question: How is Jack feeling?
questions.explanation: 「疲れている」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「寒い」→風邪ではない。2「疲れている」→正解。3「ワクワク」→言及なし。4「元気」→疲れている。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I have an older brother. He plays rugby. I'm going to join a sports club next month because I want to be as strong as my brother.

questions.question: What will the boy do next month?
questions.explanation: 「来月スポーツクラブに入る」。
highlights: join a sports club next month
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「兄を訪ねる」→言及なし。2「兄に電話」→言及なし。3「スポーツクラブに入る」→正解。4「ラグビー観戦」→兄がプレーする。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Class, we're going to go to the zoo tomorrow. Please bring your lunch and don't forget to wear a hat. It'll be hot and sunny.

questions.question: What is the woman talking about?
questions.explanation: 「明日動物園に行く」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日の天気」→明日の予定。2「新しい制服」→帽子をかぶる。3「レストラン」→動物園。4「動物園への遠足」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I like to walk my dog every day. Sometimes we walk to the river, and sometimes we walk to the bridge. But today, we're going to walk to my friend's house.

questions.question: Where will the girl walk her dog today?
questions.explanation: 「今日は友達の家に歩いて行く」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ペットショップ」→言及なし。2「友達の家」→正解。3「川」→時々。4「橋」→時々。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Good afternoon, customers. This week, we're having a sale on basketballs and soccer balls. On the weekend, tennis and badminton rackets will be on sale, too.

questions.question: Where is the man talking?
questions.explanation: 「バスケットボールやサッカーボールのセール」→スポーツ用品店。
highlights: sale on basketballs and soccer balls
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「野球場」→セール。2「学校の体育館」→お客さん向け。3「スポーツ用品店」→正解。4「職員室」→お客さん向け。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Last July, I went to Rome. I went shopping, and I also went to some museums. Next year, I want to visit London.

questions.question: What does the woman want to do next year?
questions.explanation: 「来年ロンドンを訪れたい」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「デパートで働く」→買い物した。2「博物館で働く」→行った。3「ローマに行く」→去年。4「ロンドンに行く」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Some of my friends have pets. Lucy has a white dog, and Bob has two brown cats. I like Tom's black rabbit. They are all cute.

questions.question: Whose pet is black?
questions.explanation: 「トムの黒いウサギが好き」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「女の子の」→ペット言及なし。2「ルーシーの」→白い犬。3「ボブの」→茶色い猫。4「トムの」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Every year, on John's birthday, his mother cooks dinner, and his father makes a cake. He always feels happy on his birthday because he can have a birthday party at home.

questions.question: Why does John always feel happy on his birthday?
choices: He can have a party at home.
questions.explanation: 「家で誕生日パーティーができるから」。
highlights: he can have a birthday party at home
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家でパーティーができる」→正解。2「親がケーキを買う」→父が作る。3「お金をもらう」→言及なし。4「夕食がおいしい」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Tim and his friend were at the park. They got hungry, so they went to a café near there. They stayed there for two hours because it started raining.

questions.question: Why did Tim go to the café?
questions.explanation: 「お腹が空いたのでカフェに行った」。
highlights: They got hungry, so they went to a café
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お腹が空いた」→正解。2「雨が降り始めた」→長くいた理由。3「友達が働いている」→言及なし。4「有名なカフェ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Akira bought a magazine this morning. He enjoyed reading it before dinner. He didn't do this after dinner because he studied then.

questions.question: When did Akira read a magazine?
questions.explanation: 「夕食前に読んだ」。
highlights: He enjoyed reading it before dinner
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今朝」→買った。2「昼食前」→言及なし。3「夕食前」→正解。4「夕食後」→勉強した。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: There is a new bookstore near my house. There are many kinds of books in the store. After school, I often go there to buy some comic books.

questions.question: What is the boy talking about?
questions.explanation: 「家の近くの新しい本屋」について話している。
highlights: a new bookstore near my house
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校の図書館」→本屋。2「本屋」→正解。3「家」→本屋の話。4「漫画」→本屋で買う。
